ValidationRule.description: Investment Committed amount must be populated when an Investor Outreach Opportunity reaches 5. Committed or 6. Closed Won. Ensures round roll-up totals are accurate.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Investor_Outreach', OR( ISPICKVAL(StageName, '5. Committed'), ISPICKVAL(StageName, '6. Closed Won') ), OR( ISBLANK(Investment_Committed__c), Investment_Committed__c = 0 ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Investment Committed amount is required at 5. Committed and 6. Closed Won stages.
